testcase.name: test_terms_returns_available_years
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_iteration_19.py:22: in session return get_session() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^ backend/tests/test_iteration_19.py:16: in get_session assert r.status_code == 200, f"Login failed: {r.text}" E AssertionError: Login failed: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
